ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drill_bits" (
  "drill_bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drill bit */,
  "drill_bit_name" TEXT /* Name of the drill bit */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of drill bit (e.g., AstroBit, TurboBit) */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the drill bit */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the drill bit */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drill bit */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the drill bit */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each drill bit */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the drill bit was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the drill bit */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the drill bit (e.g., New, Used, Damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drill_bit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling parameter */,
  "drill_bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drill bit used in the drilling operation */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drilling operation */,
  "bit_depth" REAL /* Current bit depth of the drilling operation */,
  "rate_of_penetration" REAL /* Current rate of penetration of the drilling operation */,
  "hook_load" REAL /* Current hook load of the drilling operation */,
  "differential_pressure" REAL /* Current differential pressure of the drilling operation */,
  "weight_on_bit" REAL /* Current weight on bit of the drilling operation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the parameters were recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drilling operation (e.g., Active, Paused, Completed) */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque applied during drilling */,
  "rotary_rpm" REAL /* Rotational speed of the drill bit in revolutions per minute */,
  "fluid_flow_rate" REAL /* Rate at which drilling fluid is being pumped */,
  "bit_wear" TEXT /* Wear level of the drill bit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_parameters_drill_bit_id FOREIGN KEY ("drill_bit_id") REFERENCES drill_bits ("drill_bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_parameters_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES drilling_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling operation */,
  "rig_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rig used in the drilling operation */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being drilled */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drilling operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drilling operation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the drilling operation */,
  "drill_bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drill bit used in the operation */,
  "driller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driller responsible for the operation */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor overseeing the operation */,
  "depth_reached" REAL /* Maximum depth reached during the operation */,
  "total_volume_drilled" REAL /* Total volume of rock drilled */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_operations_drill_bit_id FOREIGN KEY ("drill_bit_id") REFERENCES drill_bits ("drill_bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_operations_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_operations_rig_id FOREIGN KEY ("rig_id") REFERENCES rigs ("rig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_operations_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_operations_driller_id FOREIGN KEY ("driller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rigs" (
  "rig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rig */,
  "rig_name" TEXT /* Name of the rig */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of rig (e.g., Land Rig, Offshore Rig) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the rig */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the rig */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the rig */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each rig */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the rig was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the rig */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the rig (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance, Decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "geological_formation" TEXT /* Geological formation the well is drilled into */,
  "estimated_reserves" REAL /* Estimated volume of oil or gas reserves */,
  "projected_life_span" INTEGER /* Projected life span of the well in years */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., Active, Inactive, Abandoned) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Driller, Engineer, Operations Manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Basic, Advanced, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the drilling data */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drilling operation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the drilling data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES drilling_operations ("operation_id")
)
